metadata.title: TOC compatible with Publish
metadata.description: TOC compatible with Publish Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Remove this from list
ast.target: 从列表中移除此项

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Add to list
ast.target: 添加到列表

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Open modal to organise this.
ast.target: 打开模态框以整理此项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the arrow type for your table of contents
ast.target: 为您的目录选择箭头类型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How do you want the table of contents to start.
ast.target: 您希望目录如何开始。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin needs to know to avoid the comments in these code blocks.
ast.target: 插件需要知道以避免这些代码块中的注释。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically updates the table of contents. Toggle off to turn off. May need to reload the app for this to take effect.
ast.target: 自动更新目录。关闭此开关以禁用。可能需要重新加载应用才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle on to turn all subheadings to a single hashtag.
ast.target: 打开此开关可将所有子标题转换为单个井号标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Will include the headings from before the table of contents. Toggle off to ignore these
ast.target: 将包含目录之前的标题。关闭此开关以忽略这些标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Will remove bold fonts and strikethroughs in table of contents.
ast.target: 将移除目录中标题的粗体字体和删除线。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removes and html elements you have in titles.
ast.target: 移除标题中的任何 HTML 元素。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you have links in titles, will remove the [[ and ]] in the table of contents.
ast.target: 如果标题中包含链接，将移除目录中的 [[ 和 ]]。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Removes footnotes from title in table of contents.
ast.target: 移除目录中标题的脚注。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Individualise what you want in your TOC by removing what you don't want.
ast.target: 通过移除您不想要的内容来个性化您的目录。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: List of words excluded from title.
ast.target: 从标题中排除的词语列表。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add New excluded characters
ast.target: 添加新的排除字符

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Adjust table of contents conditions
ast.target: 调整目录条件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Choose list style
ast.target: 选择列表样式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Choose the title for the table of contents
ast.target: 为目录选择标题

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Does your page contain code blocks
ast.target: 您的页面是否包含代码块

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Adjust table of contents
ast.target: 调整目录

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Automatically update the table of contents.
ast.target: 自动更新目录。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Adjust subheading links.
ast.target: 调整子标题链接。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Include content from before the table of contents.
ast.target: 包含目录之前的内容。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Remove text styling from titles in TOC.
ast.target: 移除目录中标题的文本样式。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Remove html from titles in TOC.
ast.target: 移除目录中标题的 HTML。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Remove wikilinks from titles in TOC.
ast.target: 移除目录中标题的 Wiki 链接。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Remove footnotes from titles in TOC.
ast.target: 移除目录中标题的脚注。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add New characters to remove from titles.
ast.target: 添加要从标题中移除的新字符。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The end comment the start of the table of contents was missing. Using default settings.
ast.target: 目录开始的结束注释缺失。使用默认设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Your toc was missing a property. Using default properties
ast.target: 您的目录缺少一个属性。使用默认属性。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The arrow type you entered was not recognised. Using default setting arrow.
ast.target: 您输入的箭头类型无法识别。使用默认箭头设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This word is already excluded.
ast.target: 此词已被排除。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Create table of contents
ast.target: 创建目录

ast.name: name
ast.source: Create table of contents at cursor
ast.target: 在光标处创建目录

ast.name: name
ast.source: Update table of contents
ast.target: 更新目录

ast.source: Table of contents
ast.target: 目录
